title: .ippoan-dev.yaml
description: Frontend metadata for dev-proxy. Commit to the repo root.

name.description: Must match the GitHub repo name.

subdir.description: Sub-directory under the repo where npm run dev is invoked (e.g. web for monorepos).

cmd.description: Dev command template. Default: 'PORT=$PORT HOST=0.0.0.0 npm run dev'.
